visual_language: worn wooden fairground carousel, bare incandescent bulbs, peeling gilt paint, sawdust floor, spinning horses carrying artwork panels, dusk atmosphere
intent: personal archive as living catalog — visitor clicks a passing horse mid-spin to stop the carousel and reveal the artwork panel it carries

components.description: Full-viewport circular stage with dusk sky gradient and sawdust ground
Rotating wooden platform with gilt edge decorations and bare-bulb lights
Each horse+pole unit carries one collection panel; horses bob up/down as platform spins
Clicking a horse stops the spin and slides out an artwork panel from the horse's saddle-bag
Decorative carousel topper with portfolio name in gilt lettering
Small booth UI listing collections by name with horse count
